name: pippit-video
description: Manage Pippit accounts and create, inspect, locally save, preview, and edit video jobs through one MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Manage accounts and create or edit Pippit video
interface.longDescription: Use the bundled Pippit MCP server to securely enroll and select facade-managed Access Keys, list video models, submit asynchronous generation or segment-edit jobs, automatically save completed MP4 files, and preview them through the MCP Apps local resource bridge.
defaultPrompt: List the available Pippit video models
Add or switch the Pippit account used for new video jobs
Generate a Pippit video from this prompt and reference URL
Edit a selected segment and annotated region of this completed Pippit video
Check my Pippit video job and preview it when complete
